---
title: xcode
---

```{css css_custom, code=readLines("_css_custom.css"), echo=FALSE}
```
```{r knitr_config, code=readLines("_knitr_config.R"), echo=FALSE}
```

*********************************************************************

## installation

### comand line tools

```sh
# install xcode-select (also installs git)
xcode-select --install 

# verify that you’ve successfully installed it
xcode-select -p 

# check version
xcode-select --version

# check gcc version
gcc --version 
```

### xcode app

```sh
mas search Xcode

mas install 497799835 # Xcode (10.3)
```

*********************************************************************

xcode-select -r
